name: 平乐赋
overview: After her kingdom falls, Princess Ping Le sets out to reclaim her homeland and forms an uneasy alliance with Yun Chuan, a fallen prince haunted by his past. As they navigate betrayal, hardship, and sacrifice, their partnership deepens into trust and a powerful emotional bond. Ultimately, they are forced to confront their pasts and make choices that will shape their fate and the future of their world.
